ogTitle: East Lismore vs East Lynne: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Lismore and East Lynne.
heading: East Lismore vs East Lynne — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Lismore, New South Wales and East Lynne, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to East Lynne (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Lismore or East Lynne safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Lismore has a flood risk score of 45/100, while East Lynne scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Lismore scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. East Lynne scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Lismore or East Lynne?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
